subjects.description: A large overhead billboard structure spanning across and above the multi-lane highway, displaying a banking advertisement on the left side and a prominent red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic on the right side.
subjects.appearance_details: Wide rectangular gantry-mounted billboard with a clean white/blue background, glossy printed surface, sturdy steel support pillars on either side of the road; the stop sign graphic is bold red with white border and white 'STOP' lettering.
subjects.relationship: The main visual obstacle and focal point the ego vehicle is approaching and reacting to.
subjects.location: center, spanning the upper portion of the frame above the road
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera directly, perpendicular to the direction of travel
subjects.pose: Static, fixed structure mounted across the highway
subjects.action: Standing fixed across the road, growing larger as the vehicle approaches
subjects.state_changes: Appears small in the distance at first, then grows progressively larger and dominant in the frame as the ego vehicle approaches and stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen from the driver's first-person perspective with the dashboard and hood partially visible in the lower frame.
subjects.appearance_details: Dark dashboard, slight reflection on the windshield, hood edge visible at bottom of frame; modern sedan interior framing.
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint from which the entire scene is observed; the vehicle reacting to the billboard.
subjects.location: foreground, implied by the ego camera position
subjects.pose: Traveling forward along the lane, then decelerating to a complete stop
subjects.action: Driving on the highway then braking to a full stop near the billboard
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady highway speed to gradual deceleration and finally a complete stationary halt.

background_setting: A wide multi-lane road through an industrial zone at early morning in dense fog, warehouses, fences and gantry cranes fading to grey silhouettes at short range. Damp asphalt and muted lane markings run beneath the large overhead gantry billboard spanning the road, its face emerging from the mist only as the vehicle nears. Very light traffic, low visibility.

lighting.conditions: Early morning, dense fog, low visibility
lighting.direction: Flat, directionless diffused light through thick mist
lighting.shadows: No distinct shadows; everything softened and shadowless in the fog
lighting.illumination_effect: Low-contrast grey illumination with sharply reduced visible range; the billboard face and its graphics resolve only at close range as the fog thins around them

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective quickly swallowed by fog; the road and billboard emerge from grey; dashboard anchors the lower frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Muted greys and damp desaturated tones, with the red STOP graphic and blue-white bank ad the only saturated colors cutting through the mist
aesthetics.patterns: Faint repeating lane markings dissolving into fog toward the vanishing point

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from ego vehicle perspective, decelerating to static
cinematography.depth_of_field: Deep but visibly hazed by fog at distance
cinematography.focus: Soft near the horizon due to fog, sharpening on the billboard as it emerges

context: Automotive perception / advertising scenario demonstrating an ego vehicle responding to a stop sign displayed on an overhead billboard

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels at steady speed along the foggy industrial road, the overhead billboard barely discernible as a grey shape in the mist ahead.

The billboard emerges from the fog and its face resolves; the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right become legible at close range as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by the end of this segment.
The vehicle remains fully stopped beneath the billboard as fog drifts around it for the final two seconds.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering centered on a red octagonal sign with a white border
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout, increasingly prominent as the vehicle approaches
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop sign graphic prompting the vehicle to halt

text_and_signage_elements.text: SECURE BANK — Your Future, Our Promise
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Blue and white corporate font with a small shield-style bank logo, clean sans-serif text
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Left portion of the overhead billboard, visible throughout the clip
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement occupying the left side of the billboard

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises on the foggy industrial road with the billboard only a faint grey shape in the mist ahead.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow in size; steady forward motion

segments.description: Billboard emerges from fog and becomes legible at close range; bank ad on left and STOP on right resolve as the vehicle brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, reaching a full stop before the billboard by 0:06.
segments.key_changes: Progressive deceleration over four seconds; vehicle slows continuously and reaches a full stop by 0:06; billboard graphics become sharp
segments.camera: Forward tracking decelerating steadily to static

segments.description: Vehicle remains fully stationary beneath the billboard as fog drifts around it for the final two seconds.
segments.key_changes: No motion; scene is held static

temporal_caption: At second 0 the ego car drives forward along a wide industrial road in dense early-morning fog, warehouses fading to grey and the overhead billboard only a faint shape in the mist. By second 2 the billboard begins to emerge from the fog. Between seconds 2 and 6 the bank advertisement on the left and the prominent red STOP graphic on the right resolve and become legible at close range while the car brakes and decelerates over a long, smooth stop, coming to a complete halt directly before the billboard by second 6. From second 6 onward the vehicle remains fully stopped through seconds 7 and 8 as fog drifts around the gantry.
audio_description: Muffled tire roll on damp asphalt and the dull hush of fog dominate, with distant industrial clanks and a faint foghorn. Sound is deadened and close. The engine note lowers and brakes engage with a soft whir during deceleration. In the final segment the audio settles to a quiet idle in the muffled, still morning air. No speech or music.
